zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel於大約1288年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel34歲，母親Joan de Ros28歲。他於1309年與Maud Burnell在英國諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1314年6月24日在英國享年27歲。

zh-hans.Titmarsh, Thrapston, Northamptonshire, E: 英国諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel于大约1288年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel34岁，母亲Joan de Ros28岁。他于1309年与Maud Burnell在英国諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1314年6月24日在英国享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lovell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

variants.name: Lowell
meanings: English: variant of Lovell , derived from Anglo-Norman Frenchlou ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -el.

History: Lowell is the surname of one of America's most distinguished NewEngland families, which have been prominent for over 200 years. Itsfounder, John Lowell (1743–1802), was a legislator and judge. Thecity of Lowell, MA was named in honor of his son Francis Cabot Lowell(1775–1817), a textile manufacturer.

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

variants.name: Loveall
meanings: English: presumably a variant of   Lovell  , or possibly a habitational name from Lovehall in Tayside.

variants.name: Lovewell
meanings: English (mainly Norfolk): from Middle English love ‘love’ (Old English lufian ‘to love’) + wel ‘well’ (Old English wel), presumably denoting a lover or philanderer. There may have been some confusion with Lovell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel was born about 1288, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel, was 34 and his mother, Joan de Ros, was 28. He married Maud Burnell in 1309, in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 24 June 1314, in England, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel est né environ 1288, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ros, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Maud Burnell en 1309, à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1314, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel um 1288 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel 34 und seine Mutter Joan de Ros 28. Er hat 1309 in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England Maud Burnell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Juni 1314 im Alter von 27 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel è nato il circa 1288 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Ros, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Maud Burnell nel 1309, nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 giugno 1314, nel England, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovelが約1288年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Lovell 1st Baron Lovelは34歳，母Joan de Rosは28歳であった。1309年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュでMaud Burnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1314年6月24日にイギリスで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel(이)가 대략 1288년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Ros(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1309년 영국 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 Maud Burnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년 6월 24일 영국에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel nasceu aproximadamente 1288, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ros, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Burnell em 1309, em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1314, em Inglaterra, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel родился около 1288 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ros, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Burnell в 1309 г. в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 июня 1314 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lovell 2nd Lord Lovel nació aproximadamente 1288, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan de Ros, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Maud Burnell en 1309, en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de junio de 1314, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años.
